examples: Don't regurgitate the stuff given in the textbook.
If not, then you may simply appreciate an ability to regurgitate facts.
When no other food is available, they regurgitate the honeydew to feed the colony.
Do NOT attempt to read or regurgitate every single number and fact crammed onto the slide.
Major media often regurgitate the latest news updates about accounting scandals with no explanation of how or why fraudulent transactions take place.
